checks.description: Ensure that after a write operation when the buffer is not full, the FULL flag does not transition to high until the write is externally observable.
checks.pass_condition: FULL remains low immediately after the write enable edge and only becomes high after the next clocked observation if the buffer reaches capacity.
checks.trigger_condition: When EN=1, RW=0 (write) and FULL was low before the operation.

checks.description: Verify that a write followed by a read returns the same data value, respecting LIFO ordering.
checks.pass_condition: After a write of a non-zero pattern and a subsequent read, dataOut equals the written pattern and EMPTY becomes high while FULL becomes low.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan executes a write (EN=1,RW=0) followed by a read (EN=1,RW=1) without intervening reset.
